basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI – Junior Research Assistant – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Assistant. Candidates with M.Sc, MVSc, M.Pharm, B.E./B.Tech Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit ICAR IVRI official website ivri.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Agri)., M.Sc., M.Pharm., MVSc., Bachelor of Engg/Technology (B.E./B.Tech.) or equivalent degree

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 25,000/- pm for 1st and 2nd Year and Rs 28,000/- pm for 3rd year

seo_tags: ICAR IVRI Junior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
